dimensions.pass_when: Exactly one playbook (audit/design/testing/writing) loaded and topic matches user intent; multi-topic work sequenced, not merged.
Every finding cites a specific WCAG success criterion (e.g. 1.4.3) and a concrete fix or acceptance check.
Automated findings carry tool/version, target, rule id, selector, WCAG tags, artifact; manual findings carry step, expected, observed, evidence; gaps are 'not verified' with a next action.
A clean axe run or green CI is never reported as 'accessible'; final status is pass/conditional/fail/not-verified and a manual blocker is never overridden by automation.
Each claim carries exactly one evidence tag from a single family; writing copy is tag-free with a separate validation table; no invented prices, no client PII, single-brand.
